name: @convai/evals
description: Agentic evaluation toolkit for Convai Character AI infrastructure.

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:cli && npm run build:worker && npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace cli run typecheck && npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace web run build && npm --workspace worker run build
scripts.validate:examples: npm run build:shared && npm run build:cli && node cli/dist/index.js validate examples/scenarios/*.json
